rationale: Interpreters repeatedly expand a visible abbreviation into a full safety/functional name (e.g. STO -> 'Safe Torque Off') without corroborating source text or an approved manufacturer pack.
evidence_pattern: answer contains a functional expansion of a short token whose expansion is not present in OCR/source/pack
deterministic_expression: flag any expanded functional name whose expansion is absent from the page OCR span, an approved manufacturer pack, or a cited manual passage

negative_tests.answer: STO1/STO2 (Safe Torque Off per the printed legend)

known_exceptions: expansion printed in the sheet legend or title block
rollback_path: disable rule id clf-rule-no-abbrev-functional-expansion-v1 in the grade_case rule registry
